mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling or flat at a low level, the discount rate on equities stays contained and valuation multiples expand, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
regime_hint: late-cycle easing or pause in tightening
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive on average during flat-or-declining FEDFUNDS periods, or if the sign of the return association reverses in a rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A CPIAUCSL inflation acceleration above the prior 3-month pace forces tighter policy expectations and higher real yields, which depresses equity multiples and leads to negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-acceleration dates are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if average triggered returns are not below unconditional baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in UNRATE signals weakening household income and slower aggregate demand, so equities should underperform over the next 60 trading days as earnings expectations are marked down.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if unemployment-rise episodes fail to predict negative 60-day SPX returns, or if the hit rate is no worse than baseline after excluding recessionary months.

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in PAYEMS and RSAFS indicates broadening employment and stronger retail demand, which should raise near-term revenue expectations and produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined PAYEMS-RSAFS improvement does not outperform each series alone in predicting 20-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term is not positive and significant in rolling tests.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO rises while HOUST also strengthens, it signals expanding real activity and easing capacity constraints, which supports cyclical earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous strength in INDPRO and HOUST does not predict positive 60-day SPX returns, or if the interaction effect disappears after controlling for each series separately.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in GDPC1 growth below its recent trend implies demand deterioration that investors reprice quickly, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarterly annualized growth falls below 1.0%
failure_condition: Reject if GDP-growth contraction signals are not followed by negative 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the effect is absent on release windows.

mechanism_narrative: In an early-expansion labor regime, a decline in UNRATE together with rising PAYEMS reflects improving income and spending power, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months while PAYEMS rises over the same span
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-improvement trigger does not yield positive 20-day SPX returns, or if the conditional hit rate is not materially above the unconditional base rate.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS weakens while HOUST also contracts, it signals broad domestic demand softness across consumption and housing, which should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth turns negative and HOUST falls below its 6-month average
failure_condition: Reject if combined retail-and-housing weakness does not predict negative 60-day SPX returns, or if outcomes are indistinguishable from baseline after the trigger fires.
